components_analyzed.reason: IBM AIX 7.2 standard support ended April 2022; extended support ended April 2025. No security patches available.
COBOL-2014 is an active ISO/IEC standard but extremely legacy paradigm. Modern compilers exist but the language is considered outdated for new development. High technical debt risk.
Oracle 19c Premier Support ended December 2024. Currently in Extended Support until December 2027. Migration planning should begin.
